steps.title: Use the recognition clue
steps.content: The text says visitors can easily recognize Spanish mission influence in Union Station's architecture. The blank must describe an influence that is easy to perceive throughout California.

steps.title: Reject wrong tones
steps.content: B means subtle, which conflicts with easy recognition. C means confirmed by evidence, but the sentence needs a description of the influence itself. D means debated, which the text does not suggest. The answer is A.
